reasoning: 'A Minecraft Movie' had an exceptionally strong domestic opening weekend of ~$162.7 million in April 2025, which remains the highest of the year through October. Key competitors released between May and October (like Superman, Thunderbolts*, Captain America) fell well short. The only major remaining contenders in November and December are Zootopia 2 and Avatar: Fire and Ash. Zootopia 2 is aggressively projected to potentially reach $151 million, still falling short of Minecraft. Avatar 3 is a December release; historically, James Cameron movies and December releases exhibit enormous multi-week legs rather than record-shattering opening weekends (Avatar 2 opened to $134 million). An opening exceeding $162.7 million requires a highly frontloaded blockbuster hype not typical for the remaining slate. While there is a combined ~25-30% chance that Zootopia 2 or Avatar 3 significantly overperforms, 'A Minecraft Movie' is a clear favorite to retain the top spot for the year.
